name: Device Stopped Sending Events
notes: Reports when an event source has not sent an event to the system for over 1 hour. Edit this rule to add devices you want to monitor.
conditions_text: when the event(s) have not been detected by one or more of Flow Classification Engine-5 :: vm175 for 3600 seconds
TD_list: APPLY Device Stopped Sending Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the event(s) have not been detected by one or more of Flow Classification Engine-5 :: vm175 for 3600 seconds
RED_list: Event name: Sensor Device has Stopped Sending Events
Event description: A Sensor Device has failed to send an event to the system for more than 1 hour.  Please check the device to be sure it has not failed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
